title: knautia arvernensis subsp. catalaunica
intro: Knautia arvernensis subsp. catalaunica, also known as Catalan scabious, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Knautia arvernensis subsp. catalaunica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
